# [AArch64] Wrong code at -Os -march=armv9-a+sve

**Author:** XChy
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/180251
**Status:** Open
**Labels:** backend:AArch64, miscompilation, SVE, generated by fuzzer

## Body

Reproducer: https://godbolt.org/z/bKK598ndd
Testcase (generated by Csmith):
```c
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdint.h>
int32_t g_3, g_5;
int main()
{
    int8_t l_2[6];
    for (g_3 = 0; g_3 < 6; g_3 += 1) l_2[g_3] = 7;
    for (g_3 = 5; g_3 >= 0; g_3 -= 1) g_5 ^= l_2[g_3];
    printf("checksum = %08X\n", g_5);
}
```

<details>
Reproducer: https://godbolt.org/z/bKK598ndd
Testcase (generated by Csmith):
```c
#include &lt;stdio.h&gt;
#include &lt;stdint.h&gt;
int32_t g_3, g_5;
int main()
{
    int8_t l_2[6];
    for (g_3 = 0; g_3 &lt; 6; g_3 += 1) l_2[g_3] = 7;
    for (g_3 = 5; g_3 &gt;= 0; g_3 -= 1) g_5 ^= l_2[g_3];
    printf("checksum = %08X\n", g_5);
}
```

---

### Comment 2 - davemgreen

It looks like the AA calculation for the masked load is using the full scalable width of the vector, where it should be masked. I don't believe there is a way to represent that in the MMO at the moment.

---
